docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - THOGORI KARAGO (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)HANDWRITTEN NOTE ON ENVELOPE: "MOVED".
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: MOTION - GRANTED ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10-17-19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY THOGORI KARAGO IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT IS VACATED AND NEW TRIAL IS HELD. PLAINTIFF SARAH KANDATH IS PRESENT AND DOES NOT OPPOSE DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT THOGORI KARAGO IS NOT PRESENT. PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE MATTER IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,057.00 FILED BY KANDATH, SARAH AS TO DEFENDANT KARAGO, THOGORI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-17-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-13-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED MAY-04-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KARAGO, THOGORI
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KARAGO, THOGORI HEARING SET FOR OCT-17-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF SARAH KANDATH RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF KANDATH, SARAH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF SARAH KANDATH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THOGORI KARAGO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 7/15/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KANDATH, SARAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARAGO, THOGORI $7,057.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,132.00, *JUDGMENT VACATED PER COURT ORDER FILED ON OCT-17-2019* STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: REJECT MEMO MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON JULY 5, 2019. NO U.S. POSTAL INFORMATION PROVIDED - "MOVED" WRITTEN ON ENVELOPE.
